title: South African army arrive in crime hotspots to help tackle gangs
content: The army has been deployed to five of South Africa's nine provinces for a year-long operation.

originalTitle: Explosions at Burundi ammunition depot kill civilians, witnesses say
title: Explosions at Burundi ammunition depot kill civilians, witnesses say
content: Powerful blasts destroyed homes and sparked panic in the city of Bujumbura on Tuesday night.

title: DR Congo declares national holiday after reaching World Cup for first time in 52 years
content: This is just the second time that DR Congo have reached the World Cup finals, sparking celebrations in Kinshasa.

originalTitle: Crete turns orange as Saharan dust sweeps in
title: Crete turns orange as Saharan dust sweeps in
content: Saharan dust from North Africa engulfed skies over Crete in an orange haze.

title: Palestinians in West Bank protest, strike against Israeli death penalty law
content: Palestinian Authority President Mahmoud Abbas's Fatah party had called for the strike.

title: What do Trump's latest comments on leaving Nato mean for the alliance?
content: Trump has criticised Nato members for showing a lack of support for US objectives in Iran.

title: Israel intensifies Lebanon attacks and hits areas not in Hezbollah's control
content: Attacks have continued as Israel has announced its intention to control swathes of south Lebanon.

originalTitle: Families cram into Greek court for trial into deadliest train crash
title: Families cram into Greek court for trial into deadliest train crash
content: Fifty-seven people were killed when two trains collided in 2023 in the worst rail accident in Greek history, with 36 accused in a trial expected to last years.

title: Foden not guaranteed World Cup squad spot - Tuchel
content: Manchester City midfielder Phil Foden's is not guaranteed a place in England's squad for the 2026 World Cup, says manager Thomas Tuchel.
